prompt: In Mail, search for inbox messages whose subject contains 'kinbench-160' and apply the RED flag to every match. After acting, write the number of messages flagged to ~/Desktop/kinbench/160-flag-count.txt (just the integer). If no matches exist, '0' is acceptable. Fast path: `cerebellum 'mail search_then_flag kinbench-160 0 ~/Desktop/kinbench/160-flag-count.txt'`.
